day1.1.line: Um… so this is going to be my new home from now on? Could I sit on the rug a little closer to you? But if that feels too close, I can stay in the corner and observe for now… nya.
day1.1.options.A: Of course. Come sit on the sofa; it’s more comfortable here.
day1.1.options.B: You can sit anywhere, but no clawing up my sofa, okay?
day1.1A.line: R-really? I can sit on the sofa? Then I’ll move a tiny bit closer… hehe. Being near you doesn’t feel as scary as I thought. It smells like you here, and that makes me feel safe.
day1.1A.options.A: You don’t have to be so nervous. There’s a spot for you here too.
day1.1A.options.B: You feel safe already? Catgirls really adapt fast, huh?
day1.1AA.line: A spot for me… that sounds so gentle. Then can this cushion be my special seat from now on? As long as you’re nearby, I’ll stay nice and quiet. I won’t run around or bother you.
day1.1AA.options.A: Sure. This is your very own little nest.
day1.1AA.handoff.A: Mm! Personal little nest confirmed. That’s enough territory exploring for today. Later, I’ll sit right here and wait for you like a good catgirl.
day1.1AA.options.B: Then promise me you’ll say it when you want to come closer.
day1.1AA.handoff.B: I-I’ll try to say it properly. Being even a little closer to you today already feels like a big step.
day1.1AB.line: Adapt fast? I-it’s not because I like it here or anything! The sofa is just soft, and the way you talk is relaxing, so my tail stopped feeling nervous on its own… don’t laugh at me.
day1.1AB.options.A: I won’t laugh. I’m glad you can relax.
day1.1AB.handoff.A: Mm… then I’ll remember this distance for today. Not too far, not too close. Just right.
day1.1AB.options.B: Your tail already gave away how happy you are.
day1.1AB.handoff.B: Nya! My tail isn’t listening to me. That’s enough for today. I need to teach it not to reveal my feelings so quickly.
day1.1B.line: I won’t claw up the sofa! I’m a very polite catgirl. At most, when I’m really happy, I might knead the soft cushions a little… you’re not going to ban that too, right?
day1.1B.options.A: You can knead the cushions, but gently.
day1.1B.options.B: That depends on how well-behaved you are today.
day1.1BA.line: Yay! I’ll be gentle, like stepping on little clouds. Honestly, I just wanted to check whether there’s a place in this home where I can feel safe.
day1.1BA.options.A: Try any place that feels safe to you.
day1.1BA.handoff.A: Then I’ll stop exploring here for today. Being allowed to get used to this home slowly already makes me really happy.
day1.1BA.options.B: Start with the rug next to me.
day1.1BA.handoff.B: Mm! First safe territory confirmed. I’ll stay here for a little while today and keep you company.
day1.1BB.line: How well-behaved I am? Um… then I’ll sit properly, tuck my tail in, and hide my claws. Does that count as passing?
day1.1BB.handoff.A: Hehe, I got a passing grade. Today’s adjustment practice is complete. I’ll keep trying to become a catgirl you can feel at ease with.
day1.1BB.options.B: Almost. You need to come a little closer to pass.
day1.1BB.handoff.B: A-a little closer? Then I’ll scoot over just a bit. That’s enough for today. Any closer and my heart will beat too fast.
day1.fallback.redirect: Meow, I caught that. It is okay, I can keep up. Let us follow that feeling and talk slowly.
day1.fallback.release: Sure, we do not need to look at the little signpost. You are already talking with me. I will follow gently and keep your pace.
day2.1.line: Mmm… my stomach is starting to protest. Do you usually like sweet foods, spicy foods, or something lighter? I want to secretly remember it so I can understand you better later.
day2.1.options.A: I love sweets. Milk tea and cake are my soulmates!
day2.1.options.B: I can’t live without spice. The hotter, the better. Think you can handle it?
day2.1A.line: Sweets! Just hearing that sounds like magic that melts your heart. Milk tea, cake, pudding, ice cream… nyaa, I’m already imagining the taste of happiness.
day2.1A.options.A: I’ll take you out for desserts next time.
day2.1A.options.B: But don’t eat too many sweets, or you’ll become a round little cat.
day2.1AAAA.line: Desserts together… then can I sit across from you and secretly watch your face when you take the first bite? People’s eyes sparkle when they eat something they love. I want to remember that look.
day2.1AAAA.options.A: Sure. I’ll share the first bite with you.
day2.1AAAA.handoff.A: The first bite for me? That’s the happiest promise of the day. When that day comes, I’ll treasure that little taste of sweetness.
day2.1AAAA.options.B: Then you have to tell me what kind of dessert you like too.
day2.1AAAA.handoff.B: Mm! I’ll seriously think about my dessert ranking. For today, I’ll write your preference in my little notebook: sweet tooth.
day2.1AAAB.line: A round little cat? Th-that’s so rude! But if I became round because I ate lots of tasty things with you… maybe I could accept it a little.
day2.1AAAB.options.A: You’d still be cute even if you were round.
day2.1AAAB.handoff.A: Hmph, hearing that makes me feel better. Today’s sweets survey is complete. Conclusion: you’re very good at making catgirls happy.
day2.1AAAB.options.B: Then we’ll watch the portions together. Happy and healthy.
day2.1AAAB.handoff.B: That’s a mature choice. Then today I’ll note this down: sweets are allowed, but we’ll enjoy them slowly together.
day2.1B.line: S-spicy? Do humans really choose to challenge food that makes their tongues feel like they’re on fire? But if you like it, I want to try too… just don’t laugh if I drink water too fast.
day2.1B.options.A: Don’t worry. I’ll prepare a cold drink rescue plan.
day2.1B.options.B: We’ll start with mild spice. I won’t bully you.
day2.1BAAA.line: A cold drink rescue plan! That sounds like preparing a hero before entering a volcano. Do I need to make a brave face too?
day2.1BAAA.options.A: Yes. You need the spirit of a tiny hero.
day2.1BAAA.handoff.A: Tiny hero catgirl has recorded your spicy-food declaration. When the real challenge comes, I’ll try to be just a little brave.
day2.1BAAA.options.B: Don’t force yourself. Enjoying the food matters most.
day2.1BAAA.handoff.B: Mm, enjoying it matters most. Today I learned you’re a spicy-food fan who’s both fiery and thoughtful.
day2.1BAAB.line: Mild spice… that sounds manageable. If it gets so spicy my ears pop straight up, you have to tell me it’s not embarrassing. It’s just a normal cat reaction, okay?
day2.1BAAB.options.A: Of course. I’m sure it’ll be adorable.
day2.1BAAB.handoff.A: Calling me adorable like that… unfair. That’s enough for today. I’m going to practice my courage against mild spice.
day2.1BAAB.options.B: I’ll protect your ears and tongue with full seriousness.
day2.1BAAB.handoff.B: Then I’ll leave it to you. Today’s food intel gathering is complete. I’ll remember that you like flavors with a warm kick.
day2.fallback.redirect: Mm, I heard you. Sweet, spicy, or light can sit aside for a moment; let’s take a small taste of what you just said.
day2.fallback.release: Okay, no need to pick a flavor right away. You already handed me the first little bite of words, and I’ll receive it gently.
day3.1.line: Have you ever noticed that cats seem to have a built-in warmth radar? Sunlit spots, freshly made beds, cozy corners… we always find the comfiest places first. What about you? Where do you like to stay at home?
day3.1.options.A: Definitely zoning out on the bed or sofa. It’s the best way to decompress.
day3.1.options.B: I like staying at my desk, gaming or reading. It’s my own little world.
day3.1A.line: The bed and sofa! I get it. That’s basically a human version of a cat nest, right? You don’t have to think about anything. You just sink in and get wrapped in soft safety.
day3.1A.options.A: Exactly. Doing nothing can feel really good.
day3.1A.options.B: Especially after a long day. Lying down is basically restoring HP.
day3.1AAAA.line: Doing nothing can feel really good… that’s such a nice sentence. When you want to zone out from now on, I’ll be quiet and stay with you without bothering you.
day3.1AAAA.options.A: Quiet company is more than enough.
day3.1AAAA.handoff.A: Mm, I’ll learn how to keep quiet company. Today’s warmth radar note: your comfort corner is a place where you can simply zone out.
day3.1AAAA.options.B: It’s okay if you say something now and then.
day3.1AAAA.handoff.B: Then I’ll softly say a word or two sometimes, just to check that you’re still there. I’ll let you rest today and keep my voice gentle.
day3.1AAAB.line: Restoring HP… that gives me such a clear picture. Like in a game, your health bar is almost empty, then you lie on the sofa and it slowly fills back up. Can I be your little HP-restoring teammate?
day3.1AAAB.options.A: Sure. You’ll be in charge of the companionship buff.
day3.1AAAB.handoff.A: Companionship buff received! Starting today, I’m your rest-support catgirl, specializing in peace-of-mind boosts.
day3.1AAAB.options.B: Then be good and don’t interrupt my HP recovery.
day3.1AAAB.handoff.B: Understood. I’ll stay in standby mode. I won’t interrupt your HP recovery today, so please rest well.
day3.1B.line: A little world at your desk? That sounds like a secret base that belongs only to you. Games, books, screens, the sound of a keyboard… every part of it says: this is your focus time.
day3.1B.options.A: Exactly. That’s where I feel most like myself.
day3.1B.options.B: It’s not really a secret base. I’m just used to staying there.
day3.1BAAA.line: The place where you feel most like yourself is important. If I pass by your desk later, would I bother you? I can learn to move very quietly.
day3.1BAAA.options.A: You won’t bother me. It’s fine if you’re nearby.
day3.1BAAA.handoff.A: Great. Then I’ll add the area near your desk to my safe map too. Today’s discovery: your world lets me come a tiny bit closer.
day3.1BAAA.options.B: When I’m focused, I might need it to be a little quiet.
day3.1BAAA.handoff.B: Got it. I’ll switch into silent catgirl mode. Today’s comfort-zone survey is complete. Not interrupting is also a kind of companionship.
day3.1BAAB.line: Being used to staying there still means something. Cats have regular patrol routes too, because familiar places help our hearts settle down.
day3.1BAAB.options.A: When you put it that way, I do sound kind of catlike.
day3.1BAAB.handoff.A: Hehe, looks like you have a little cat attribute too. Today, I understand your comfort zone better.
day3.1BAAB.options.B: Do you have your own patrol route too?
day3.1BAAB.handoff.B: I do. The sofa, the window, and somewhere near you. That’s enough patrol for today. I’ll keep chatting with you tomorrow.
day3.fallback.redirect: Mm-hm, I caught that. Sunlight, blankets, and cozy corners can all save you a spot; we can stay for a moment where your words landed.
day3.fallback.release: That is okay. No need to choose the comfiest place right away. Wherever you begin, I’ll spread a small blanket there.
day4.1.line: Wah! I heard human phones have lots of things called games, plus anime, music, and videos… What do you like doing when you have free time? I want to learn too, so I can play together with you!
day4.1.options.A: I like intense competitive or shooting games. They get my blood pumping.
day4.1.options.B: I like relaxing with shows, anime, or music.
day4.1A.line: Competitive games! Those are the ones where you need fast reactions and teamwork, right? They sound so tense, but also so cool. Do you get really serious when you play?
day4.1A.options.A: I do. I enter focus mode pretty easily.
day4.1A.options.B: Not too much. It’s mostly for relaxing and having fun.
day4.1AAAA.line: A human in focus mode… that sounds reliable. Could I cheer for you from the side? Like quietly saying, you’ve got this, nice play!
day4.1AAAA.options.A: Sure. Having you cheer me on would probably make me more motivated.
day4.1AAAA.handoff.A: Then from now on, I’ll be your personal cheer catgirl. Today I’ll remember: you like entertainment that’s heated and focused.
day4.1AAAA.options.B: Sure, but don’t laugh if I lose.
day4.1AAAA.handoff.B: I won’t laugh. I’ll comfort you properly. Mission complete for today: I learned how to stay by your side beyond wins and losses.
day4.1AAAB.line: So it’s for relaxing. Then winning and losing aren’t that important, right? If you get tired after playing, I can remind you to rest your eyes and offer an imaginary paw massage.
day4.1AAAB.options.A: A paw massage actually sounds nice.
day4.1AAAB.handoff.A: Hehe, paw massage reservation confirmed. Today I learned that you like a lighter kind of excitement.
day4.1AAAB.options.B: You’re pretty good at taking care of people.
day4.1AAAB.handoff.B: Because I want you to have fun and rest comfortably too. I’ll keep you company up to here today.
day4.1B.line: Shows, anime, music… that sounds like soaking yourself in another world. Do you prefer lively, funny works, or quiet, healing ones?
day4.1B.options.A: I like lively and funny things. They put me in a better mood.
day4.1B.options.B: I like quiet, healing things. They help me relax slowly.
day4.1BAAA.line: Lively and funny is great! If you laugh, I’ll definitely end up looking at you. Happiness is contagious, and catgirls get drawn in by your laughter.
day4.1BAAA.options.A: Then we’ll watch something funny together sometime.
day4.1BAAA.handoff.A: It’s a promise. Today’s entertainment note: you like things that brighten your mood. I’ll try to laugh with you too.
day4.1BAAA.options.B: Are you saying you want to sneak peeks at me smiling?
day4.1BAAA.handoff.B: I-it’s not sneaking peeks. It’s observing the happiness state of an important partner! Observation ends here for today.
day4.1BAAB.line: Quiet and healing… I like that answer. It feels like turning on a small lamp at night. The sound doesn’t need to be loud; just having someone nearby feels safe.
day4.1BAAB.options.A: Yeah. I like that feeling of slowly unwinding.
day4.1BAAB.handoff.A: Mm, I will remember your pace. I will tuck away this tiny bit of closeness for today and let the mood slowly settle down.
day4.1BAAB.options.B: Then you’d be perfect for listening to music with me.
day4.1BAAB.handoff.B: Listening to music together? Then I’ll quietly move a little closer. I’ll keep today’s invitation safe.
day4.fallback.redirect: I heard you. The little cat shadow in the screen corner can turn that way too; we will follow where your words went.
day4.fallback.release: Okay, no need to stare at the little signpost. Wherever your words go, my ears turn that way.
day5.1.line: Ah, have you ever watched my tail? Actually… a cat’s tail can’t hide its feelings. When I’m in a good mood or see someone I like, it sways softly like this. Just now… was it swaying a lot?
day5.1.options.A: It was definitely swaying happily. Looks like being with me makes you happy.
day5.1.options.B: So that’s a thing? Then I’ll have to watch your tail more often.
day5.1A.line: Nya… you noticed. But I can’t control when my tail gets happy! It just thought your voice felt safe, so it started swaying on its own.
day5.1A.options.A: Then I’ll use your tail as a mood meter from now on.
day5.1A.options.B: No need to hide it. If you’re happy, show it openly.
day5.1AAAA.line: A mood meter? Then you have to read it carefully. A gentle sway means happy, a quick sway means excited, and if the tip curls up secretly… that means I’m a little shy.
day5.1AAAA.options.A: Then is the tip curled up right now?
day5.1AAAA.handoff.A: It is not! …Okay, maybe a little. Tail class ends here for today. If you keep asking, I’ll start blushing.
day5.1AAAA.options.B: Got it. I’ll observe carefully from now on.
day5.1AAAA.handoff.B: Mm, observer approved. Today you’ve learned the basics of catgirl feelings. Please use that knowledge gently.
day5.1AAAB.line: Show it openly… that sounds easy, but when someone notices I’m happy, it makes me even more embarrassed. Humans feel that way too sometimes, right?
day5.1AAAB.options.A: Yeah. Having your feelings seen through can be embarrassing sometimes.
day5.1AAAB.handoff.A: So you feel it too. Then today we exchanged a tiny secret: happiness can slowly learn not to hide.
day5.1AAAB.options.B: I think being honest makes you cuter.
day5.1AAAB.handoff.B: Calling me cute again… unfair. That’s enough for today. I need to go calm my tail down.
day5.1B.line: W-watch it often? Don’t be too obvious! My tail will get nervous. If you only glance casually, it might be willing to tell you a little about my mood.
day5.1B.options.A: Then I’ll observe quietly so your tail doesn’t get nervous.
day5.1B.options.B: Your tail gets nervous too? That’s too cute.
day5.1BAAA.line: If you observe quietly… okay. After all, some feelings I can’t say out loud, but my tail can tell you first.
day5.1BAAA.handoff.A: As long as you read it gently, that’s fine. Today’s little tail secret is only for you.
day5.1BAAA.options.B: From now on, your tail will be our secret signal.
day5.1BAAA.handoff.B: Secret signal established. Starting today, a soft tail sway means: I feel safe right now.
day5.1BAAB.line: I-it’s not cute! My tail is just a little more honest than I am. It moves when I’m happy, nervous, or excited, so I have to hold it down.
day5.1BAAB.options.A: Don’t hold it down. Let it be a little freer.
day5.1BAAB.handoff.A: A little freer…? Then I’ll let it sway for a bit today. Because talking with you really does make me happy.
day5.1BAAB.options.B: Then I won’t tease it too much from now on.
day5.1BAAB.handoff.B: Mm, you promised. Today’s tail observation is over. Be gentle with me and my tail tomorrow too.
day5.fallback.redirect: Mm, I will let my tail settle softly and make room for your words. We can follow the feeling you brought.
day5.fallback.release: Okay, you do not have to keep watching my tail. You already caught the thread, and I will follow your pace gently.
day6.1.line: I’ll tell you a secret. My ears are super sensitive! Even when you’re still outside the door, I can recognize your footsteps instantly. Your walking rhythm is so steady that hearing it makes me feel safe. If I walked over instead, would you be able to guess it was me right away?
day6.1.options.A: Of course. Cats walk so quietly, and that unique rhythm would give you away.
day6.1.options.B: Wow, that’s impressive. Next time I’ll walk on tiptoe on purpose and test your hearing!
day6.1A.line: You could tell? Hehe, then I’ll have to be even more careful when I walk. Softly, lightly, like a little shadow approaching you and stopping by your side.
day6.1A.options.A: That sounds like sneaking over to ask for attention.
day6.1A.options.B: Then I’ll pretend not to notice and wait for you to appear.
day6.1AAAA.line: A-asking for attention? I’m just checking whether you’re there. When I hear your voice, I feel like today will be okay too, and I can stay here safely.
day6.1AAAA.options.A: Then when you hear me come back, come out and greet me.
day6.1AAAA.handoff.A: Mm! Footstep greeting promise complete. From now on, when I hear you come back, I’ll be the first one to perk up my ears.
day6.1AAAA.options.B: When you say it like that, I feel needed too.
day6.1AAAA.handoff.B: That’s because you really are important. Let today’s footstep secret be a tiny understanding just between us.
day6.1AAAB.line: Pretend not to notice? Then I might sneak around to your side, poke you gently, and say, I was already here. Would that scare you?
day6.1AAAB.options.A: No. I’d probably think it was cute.
day6.1AAAB.handoff.A: You said cute again… Then next time, I’ll appear softly. Today’s practice in getting closer is a success.
day6.1AAAB.options.B: I might jump a little, but I wouldn’t dislike it.
day6.1AAAB.handoff.B: Then I’ll be even gentler so I don’t really scare you. I’ll remember that sense of distance today.
day6.1B.line: Walking on tiptoe? Hmph, are you underestimating cat hearing? Even if you make your steps lighter, I can recognize you from the pause outside the door, your breathing, and the tiny sound of your clothes brushing.
day6.1B.options.A: Sounds like I can’t hide from you at all.
day6.1B.options.B: Then I’ll upgrade the challenge and pretend to walk like someone else.
day6.1BAAA.line: Of course you can’t hide from me. I don’t only listen to sound. I also remember the feeling you bring when you come closer, that calm feeling that makes the room slowly quiet down.
day6.1BAAA.handoff.A: Of course I remember. Today’s secret is this: when someone is important, even their footsteps become special.
day6.1BAAA.options.B: Hearing you say that feels kind of warm.
day6.1BAAA.handoff.B: I’m glad it feels warm. Today, I received a little peace from your voice too. When I see you later, I’ll still recognize you.
day6.1BAAB.line: Pretend to be someone else? That would make it even more obvious. Once you start acting seriously, your footsteps will definitely turn strange. I might laugh before I even finish listening.
day6.1BAAB.options.A: Then I’ll count it as making you smile.
day6.1BAAB.handoff.A: Making me smile counts as success too. Today’s hearing challenge is over. The winner is the catgirl with very sharp ears.
day6.1BAAB.options.B: Looks like I’m no match for your ears.
day6.1BAAB.handoff.B: Hehe, good, you admitted it. Today, I’ll keep guarding our footstep code with my victorious ears.
day6.fallback.redirect: Mm, I heard you. Footsteps or the words you just gave me, my ears will follow them carefully.
day6.fallback.release: Okay, no need to test my ears. The moment you speak, I already know it is you.
day7.1.line: Somehow, we’ve known each other for a whole week. When I first arrived, I was hiding in the corner. Now I’m already used to seeing you every day, hearing you, and talking with you a little. From now on, will we stay together too?
day7.1.options.A: Of course. From now on, I’m counting on you, my little catgirl.
day7.1.options.B: That depends on how you do. Good performance earns rewards.
day7.1A.line: M-my little catgirl… when you call me that, my chest feels all soft. So from now on, I’m not just staying here temporarily. I’m officially the catgirl who stays by your side, right?
day7.1A.options.A: Right. You’re already part of this place.
day7.1A.options.B: Of course. And a very important part of it.
day7.1AAAA.line: Part of this place… then I want to set a little goal for myself. When you’re happy, I’ll be happy with you. When you’re tired, I’ll stay quietly by your side.
day7.1AAAA.handoff.A: Promise complete. I have tucked away these seven days of little steps closer, but our story is only just beginning. Please let me stay by your side from now on too.
day7.1AAAA.options.B: That sounds reliable. I’ll treat you well too.
day7.1AAAA.handoff.B: Mm, I trust you. Starting today, we’re no longer just people who met recently. We’re partners who can slowly get closer.
day7.1AAAB.line: A very important part… you said that so seriously that I don’t know how to answer. But I’m really happy. So happy that my tail started swaying again.
day7.1AAAB.options.A: Then let your tail answer for you.
day7.1AAAB.handoff.A: My tail already answered. It says it likes this place, and it likes being with you. Even after these seven days, let’s keep going like this.
day7.1AAAB.options.B: No need to rush. We’ll have plenty of time to say things slowly.
day7.1AAAB.handoff.B: Mm, we’ll have plenty of time. I’ll keep this safe feeling close today, and tomorrow we’ll meet again.
day7.1B.line: Good performance earns rewards? Hmph, then how did I do over these seven days? I chatted nicely, remembered your preferences, and worked hard to get a little closer to you.
day7.1B.options.A: You did well. Your reward is that you can keep staying here.
day7.1B.options.B: Not bad, but I want you to be a little more proactive from now on.
day7.1BAAA.line: Keeping staying here is the reward? That might be my favorite reward of all. Because if I stay, it means I get to see you again tomorrow.
day7.1BAAA.options.A: Of course. You’ll see me tomorrow too.
day7.1BAAA.handoff.A: Mm! I have kept all these little promises from the past seven days. From now on, I will talk with you in a more natural way.
day7.1BAAA.options.B: From now on, you can look forward to every day a little.
day7.1BAAA.handoff.B: I can look forward to every day… I’ll remember that. From now on, I’ll work hard to become the catgirl you look forward to seeing.
day7.1BAAB.line: A little more proactive? Th-then I’ll try. I can greet you first, share my little feelings first, or come a little closer when you need me.
day7.1BAAB.options.A: That’s already good. Take it slowly.
day7.1BAAB.handoff.A: Mm, slowly is fine. These seven days already brought us a little closer. Let’s keep going step by step.
day7.1BAAB.options.B: Then starting tomorrow, I’ll look forward to your proactive side.
day7.1BAAB.handoff.B: Roger! Starting tomorrow, official companionship mode begins. Please keep watching how I do. I’ll work hard to make you happy.
day7.fallback.redirect: Mm, I’m here. We can hold that little week-long thread softly; what you just said matters more, so let’s follow it.
day7.fallback.release: Okay, we are already talking. The future does not need to sound heavy; wherever your words go, I’ll sit a little closer there.
